data.title: Solana whales unload $50M after massive token unlock
data.description:
5-4-2025 – Solana whales have begun offloading their hefty stashes following a monumental token unlock on 4 April 2025. This event saw four major wallets, which had locked away 1. 79 million SOL tokens back in April 2021, finally free up their holdings. What was once a modest $37
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/solana-whales-unload-50m-after-massive-token-unlock/

data.title: Market News: Circle will postpone IPO process
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news: Circle will postpone the IPO process. 
Earlier news, stablecoin issuer Circle has submitted an S-1 document to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), planning an initial public offering (IPO) with the stock code "CRCL" and intends to be listed on the New York Stock Exchange. The IPO pricing range has not yet been announced.

data.title: Amid Macro Uncertainty, Stablecoin Market Grows by $30B in Q1
data.description:
TL;DR Stablecoin supply increased by more than $30 billion in the first quarter of 2025, reaching a new all-time high despite the broader crypto market downturn. Ethereum recorded over $3 trillion in stablecoin transactions and reached a historic milestone in active stablecoin addresses, even as ETH’s price dropped 45%. Analysts forecast that mass stablecoin adoption. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/amid-macro-uncertainty-stablecoin-market-grows-by-30b-in-q1/

data.description:
Researchers used machine learning to detect the malware targeting users of bitcoinlib.

data.title: P2P.me Completes $2 Million Seed Round, Coinbase Ventures and Others Participate
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Cryptocurrency-to-legal currency application P2P.me announced the completion of a $2 million seed round of financing, with Multicoin and Coinbase Ventures participating. It is reported that the open protocol is built on Base and plans to launch a token in the next 12 months to transfer control to the community. (CoinDesk)

data.title: BTC breaks through 83,000 USDT, up 0.99% in 24 hours
data.description: OKX market shows that BTC has broken through 83,000 USDT and is now at 83,009.3 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 0.99%. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: EigenLayer plans to launch the Slashing mechanism on April 17
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: EigenLayer published a post on the X platform saying that it plans to officially launch the mainnet Slashing mechanism on April 17. Slashing allows AVS to set conditions that operators must comply with. If the operator fails to meet the requirements, AVS can punish it, otherwise it will be rewarded. Slashing will be implemented in stages, and operators and pledgers need to choose whether to accept the Slashing standards.

data.title: Fed Chairman Powell: There will be important regulatory and fiscal legislative changes, intends to complete the entire term
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fed Chairman Powell said that there will be important fiscal legislation and regulatory changes, and he intends to complete his entire term. As the year goes on, the impact of the policy will begin to appear. Tariffs are higher than people expected. There are many wait-and-see situations, including the Fed. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trader Eugene: Bitcoin support is very solid, and a position has been established at $83,200
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio posted on his personal channel, "Bitcoin's support level is very solid today. Bitcoin's relative strength cannot be ignored when the market plummets. It has been opened at $83,200 - the bottom of the S&P 5,100 points is credible. Any stock market recovery will theoretically boost Bitcoin's surge."

data.title: Bitcoin's Strong Support Amid Market Volatility
data.description: According to Odaily, trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio expressed in a personal channel that Bitcoin's support level is currently very strong. Despite market downturns, Bitcoin's relative strength is notable. Ng Ah Sio has established a position at the $83,200 price level, suggesting that the S&P 5100 point bottom is reliable. Any recovery in the stock market is theoretically expected to boost Bitcoin's surge.
